title: [FOLDED → OOM-0036] Abort: negative-refcount over-decref in `_PyFrame_ClearLocals` (`frame.c:101`)
notes: RETIRED 2026-06-25 — folded into OOM-0036. `_PyFrame_ClearLocals`@frame.c:101 / `PyStackRef_XCLOSE`@pycore_stackref.h:726 is a generic eval-loop over-decref DETECTOR (the same frames are shared by OOM-0007/0023 as fatals), NOT a distinct bug site. rr reverse-execution proved BOTH of OOM-0005's reproducers are OOM-0036 (the `_CALL_LIST_APPEND` list.append double-free, python/cpython#151818): the victim is `list.append`-ed (its grow fails under OOM, decref at listobject.c:531 from `_CALL_LIST_APPEND` gen 3981) with a second live reference, and the leftover stolen stackref is closed again during the unwind -> over-decref, detected here. repro.py = `xml.dom.minidom.parse(0)` sweep (rr-confirmed OOM-0036; also kept as OOM-0036/repro_xml_minidom.py); the pkgutil.get_importer(str) UAF reproducer (frame.c:101 negref / PyOS_FSPath SEGV; preserved in this tombstone dir as repro.py + backtrace.txt) is ALSO rr-confirmed OOM-0036. The frame.c:101 + pycore_stackref.h:726 (+ _PyFrame_ClearExceptCode / clear_thread_frame) frames are now SKIP-LISTED as generic over-decref detectors (gen_known_sites.GENERIC_DETECTOR_FUNCS) -- they were spuriously shared as keys across OOM-0005/0007/0023 and caused this mislabel, so they are NOT dedup keys for any bug. A bare frame.c:101 over-decref abort now surfaces as oomNEW -> rr-triage (almost always OOM-0036; confirm the producer is _CALL_LIST_APPEND). CAVEAT / possible-distinct-producer: OOM-0005's ORIGINAL discovery capture reported a `MemoryError` victim (not a str), which is not a list-append victim — so a genuinely-distinct over-decref producer at this detector cannot be fully ruled out, but it is NOT reproducible/pinned (every face we can reproduce is OOM-0036). If a frame.c:101 over-decref abort recurs whose producer (via rr) is NOT `_CALL_LIST_APPEND`, re-open as a distinct bug. EARLIER ERROR (corrected): a prior 7-step reverse trace stopped before the list.append and wrongly concluded the pkgutil face was distinct; the full ledger shows the append. Gen scripts skip status==folded (not counted, no keys emitted). Upstream: the issue filed from this finding is a duplicate of #151818 (dup comment posted, closed); gist 22b71f61 corrected/superseded. See reports/OOM-0036-list-append-oom-double-free/. id NOT reused.
